sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17242" key="a)trw/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀτρώς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n17242.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἄτρωτος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:p.159H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.159H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
